About Organization

UPSRTC is a government organization responsible for providing transportation services in Uttar Pradesh, India.
UPSRTC aims to provide efficient and reliable transportation services to the public.

About the Programme

The UPSRTC Meerut Bus Conductor Recruitment 2026 aims to hire bus conductors for the UPSRTC organization.
The programme is open to eligible applicants who meet the required criteria.
